name: Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) and set rack at middle level.
Break the almond paste into 1-inch pieces. In a mixing bowl, combine the almond paste with the sugars. Mix on the slowest speed until everything is crumbled together.
Add the egg whites in three to four additions, beating well after each addition. Scrape the sides of the bowl frequently as you add the egg whites.
Allow the mixture to rest for some time before packing it into a plastic container and refrigerating overnight if possible.
Pipe 3/4 to 1-inch macaroons onto parchment or wax paper-lined cookie trays, leaving 1 inch between each.
Moisten the surface of the macarons with a wet towel and sprinkle with granulated or confectioners' sugar.
Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until well puffed and golden. Cool completely before removing from paper by turning over and moistening the back of the paper, then peeling it off.
Yield: 34 cookies
